_: HOLO-Q-FLAWLESS-GATE X5 — the Conformance Contract. The audit (holo audit) and the ship gate read THIS file to decide what a clean ledger means. Every allowlist entry MUST carry a why; the audit refuses the contract otherwise. Changing the standard = a reviewed edit here, never a silent gate-code change.

rung-ladder fall-through by design — lean Q keeps CAS bodies on mirror/HF rungs; the origin b/ probe is the first rung's honest miss (NOTHING-GROWS)
